textTemplates.name: thankYouLabelTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: thank you for your time ,we will send feedback email to your email address. and pls donwload the "Salesforce" APP thru google play or apple store. the app look like below pic

textTemplates.name: welcome_question_lref_tt
textTemplates.text: Welcome join Hisense Chile Team ，Pls fulfill this form，our support team will create new account for you after receiving your info
